expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: The result does not provide any actual coverage details. It states: “ERROR: Unable to proceed — missing required benchmark evidence” and “I cannot infer supported formats/entry points/output expectations or claim checkpoint coverage without the missing customer-issue artifacts.” No supported formats, entry points, or output expectations are distinguished.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Although it claims intent (“produce phase5b-aligned advisory checkpoint enforcement coverage”), it does not deliver phase5b content and instead reports inability to proceed due to missing evidence. It also says: “Files produced: none (cannot write `./outputs/result.md` or `./outputs/execution_notes.md` ...)” indicating non-alignment with producing the expected phase5b deliverable.
